description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
At 2:23pm:  WeRide driverless vehicle (vehicle 1) was travelling ~45mph without much traffic ahead when a BMW x3 (vehicle 2) 
travelling in the adjacent left lane and in the same direction, merged into vehicle 1's left front quarter panel. Vehicle 1 and Vehicle 2 
sustained moderate damages.
After discussing the incident with vehicle 2's driver, they admitted they were attempting to make an upcoming right turn off the expressway.
 They initiated 2 consecutive right lane changes abruptly before hitting vehicle 1 on their last attempted lane change.
After the initial impact, vehicle 1 was forced out of the initial lane, onto a divide, and ultimately came to a stop on the shoulder of the 
expressway. At this time both occupants of vehicle 1 and vehicle 2 were able to assess respective damages and exchange information. It was
 determined that there were no injuries. Vehicle 1 required a tow back to the facility. 
Print
Clear Form
